display.purpose: Hero headlines. Used once per page. The single bold statement.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Never more than one per section.

title.purpose: Card headings, project titles, sub-section headers.

body.purpose: Descriptions, project summaries, paragraph copy. Cap at 75ch.

label.purpose: Project type labels, tech category headers.

shadows.name: cta-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: White glow on primary CTA hover state.

shadows.name: cta-hover-glow-small
shadows.purpose: White glow on small CTA hover state.

shadows.name: pulse-dot-glow
shadows.purpose: Blue glow on hero status pulse dot.

shadows.name: tab-active-glow
shadows.purpose: White glow on active tab button.

motion.name: ease-out-default
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover lifts and reveals.

motion.name: duration-hover
motion.purpose: Hover transition duration for buttons and cards.

motion.name: duration-image-scrub
motion.purpose: Slow image pan on browser mockup hover.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: High-contrast white pill for primary actions: View Details, View Mobile Apps, Source Code.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ffffff; color: #000000; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; padding: 1rem 2rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e5e5e5; transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }

components.name: Secondary CTA Button
components.description: Outlined dark pill for secondary actions: View Web Apps.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #ffffff; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; padding: 1rem 2rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(39, 39, 42, 0.8); }

components.name: Tech Stack Chip
components.description: Static pill showing technology name. Grouped in flex-wrap rows.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #a1a1aa; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Default project card in the portfolio grid. Dark, thin border, pill tags.
components.html:
RouteSync

A mobile-first travel coordination platform.

React NativeExpo
components.css: .ds-card-project { background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.5); border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 2rem; transition: border-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-card-project:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }

components.name: Section Card (Glass)
components.description: Glass-morphism section container with backdrop blur. Used on portfolio page.
components.html:
Professional Summary

MCA candidate and full-stack developer...
components.css: .ds-section-card { background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.4); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-radius: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 2rem; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); }

components.name: iPhone Frame (Mobile Mockup)
components.description: Device frame for mobile app screenshots. 280x600px with dynamic island.
components.css: .ds-iphone-frame { width: 280px; height: 600px; border-radius: 3rem; border: 8px solid #18181b; background: #000; overflow: hidden; position: relative; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-dynamic-island { position: absolute; top: 0.5rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 90px; height: 25px; background: #000; border-radius: 9999px; z-index: 30; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; padding: 0 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.1) inset; } .ds-camera { width: 0.625rem; height: 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #27272a; }

components.name: Browser Frame (Web Mockup)
components.description: Browser window frame for web app screenshots with macOS traffic lights.
components.html: Web App Content
components.css: .ds-browser-frame { width: 100%; border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: #09090b; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-browser-bar { height: 2.5rem; background: #18181b; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 1rem; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-traffic-light { width: 0.75rem; height: 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; }

narrative.overview: A dark, energetic portfolio that feels like walking through a gallery after hours — deep backgrounds, glowing accents, and project work illuminated against the dark. The system is confident and minimal in structure but playful in its lighting. The palette is restrained to a dark neutral core with a triadic blue-cyan-purple accent system used sparingly. This system explicitly rejects over-animation and gimmicky motion.
keyCharacteristics: Dark canvas (zinc-950 / black) with warm-white text
Triadic accent system (blue, cyan, purple) used as sparing highlights
Ambient glow via blurred color halos behind mockups
MacOS browser frame and iPhone frame as project presentation devices
Glass-morphism section cards with subtle backdrop blur
Pill-shaped buttons and chips reinforce a soft, approachable feel

rules.name: The Glow-As-Light Rule
rules.body: Ambient colored halos are the only lighting effect. Never use drop shadows for ambient lighting; the glow is the light.

dos: Do use the triadic accent system sparingly — one accent per section, never all three on the same surface.
Do use ambient glow halos behind mockups for depth.
Do use Geist across the full weight range (300-800) for hierarchy.
Do use pill shapes for buttons, chips, and interactive elements.
Do keep CTAs high-contrast: white background, black text.
Do let motion serve understanding: hover lifts, scroll reveals, ease-out curves.
donts: Don't use gradient text except for the hero name treatment.
Don't over-animate or add flashy effects. No bounce, no elastic, no choreographed entrance sequences.
Don't use box shadows as the primary depth mechanism — ambient glow is preferred.
Don't add a persistent navigation bar. The portfolio is a single scroll with section links.
Don't use the accent colors as surface fills or backgrounds.
Don't use decorative fonts. The Geist family is the only typeface.
Don't add card grids with identical icon + heading + text layouts.
